title: Distinct Consulting
summary: Built a custom SaaS web application for Distinct Consulting that turns manual, time-intensive investigation reporting into a structured, scalable system combining guided workflows with AI-powered report generation (OpenAI API), covering case creation, evidence/document uploads, multi-section report generation (introduction, parties involved, allegations, policies, evidence summaries, findings of fact), and admin controls for users and AI usage.
quote: Reduce report development time from 4-5 hours to just minutes.
results: Investigation report development time cut from 4-5 hours to just minutes.
Consistent, professional, legally defensible report formatting across all cases.
Centralized case data, document, and evidence management in one platform.
Scalable usage and admin controls for managing AI-assisted report generation.
